ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program (e.g., Computer Science) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree awarded (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "program_head" TEXT /* Name of the program head */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Description of admission requirements */,
  "career_outcomes" TEXT /* Common career outcomes for graduates of the program */,
  "average_graduation_rate" REAL /* Average graduation rate for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student being admitted */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of application submission */,
  "admission_decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the application (e.g., Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "application_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the application fee was paid */,
  "test_scores" TEXT /* JSON object containing standardized test scores (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  "transcripts_received" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if transcripts were received */,
  "interview_status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., scheduled, completed, not required) */,
  "admission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the admission process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for graduation record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student graduating */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program completed */,
  "graduation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the graduation */,
  "graduation_type" TEXT /* Type of graduation (e.g., honors, regular) */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis, if applicable */,
  "thesis_advisor" TEXT /* Name of the thesis advisor, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for employment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student employed */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title held by the student */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date employment started */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the employment */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employment */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average */,
  "credits_completed" INTEGER /* Total credits completed */,
  "honors_status" TEXT /* Honors status (e.g., Honors, Regular) */,
  "semester_gpa" REAL /* GPA for the current semester */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA */,
  "number_of_courses_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of courses taken */,
  "awards_received" TEXT /* List of awards received by the student */,
  "research_projects" TEXT /* List of research projects the student has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the faculty member works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* List of research interests */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications by the faculty member */,
  "courses_taught" TEXT /* List of courses taught by the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for advisor record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member serving as an advisor */,
  "advisor_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the advisor-student relationship */,
  "meeting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of meetings between the advisor and the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisors_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the section */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom where the section is held */,
  "class_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the section (e.g., MWF 9:00 AM - 10:15 AM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom where the course is held */,
  "class_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course (e.g., MWF 9:00 AM - 10:15 AM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of enrollment (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of classes attended */,
  "course_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the course enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commuting" (
  "commute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commuting record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student commuting */,
  "distance_miles" REAL /* Distance to campus in miles */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport used (e.g., car, bus, bike) */,
  "commute_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to commute in minutes */,
  "commute_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of commuting (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "preferredParkingLot" TEXT /* Preferred parking lot for campus parking */,
  "commute_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the commute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commute_id")
)
